1→use std::{convert::Infallible, sync::Arc, time::Duration};
     2→
     3→use aios_protocol::{
     4→    AgentStateVector, BranchId, BranchInfo, BranchMergeResult, EventKind, EventRecord,
     5→    ModelRouting, OperatingMode, PolicySet, SessionId, ToolCall,
     6→};
     7→use aios_runtime::{KernelRuntime, TickInput};
     8→use arcan_core::runtime::{ProviderFactory, SwappableProviderHandle};
     9→use axum::{
    10→    Json, Router,
    11→    extract::{Path, Query, State},
    12→    http::StatusCode,
    13→    response::sse::{Event, KeepAlive, Sse},
    14→    response::{IntoResponse, Response},
    15→    routing::{get, post},
    16→};
    17→use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
    18→use serde_json::json;
    19→use tokio::{fs, sync::mpsc};
    20→use tokio_stream::{StreamExt, wrappers::ReceiverStream};
    21→use tracing::Instrument;
    22→use utoipa::{IntoParams, OpenApi, PartialSchema, ToSchema};
    23→use utoipa_scalar::{Scalar, Servable};
    24→use uuid::Uuid;
    25→
    26→// ─── Mirror schemas for external aios-protocol types ─────────────────────────
    27→//
    28→// These structs mirror the shape of aios-protocol types that don't derive
    29→// `ToSchema`. They are used *only* in `#[openapi(components(schemas(...)))]`
    30→// so Scalar renders proper typed definitions instead of opaque `Object`.
    31→
    32→/// Operating mode of the agent kernel.
    33→#[derive(ToSchema)]
    34→#[schema(as = OperatingMode)]
    35→#[allow(dead_code)]
    36→enum OperatingModeSchema {
    37→    /// High uncertainty — read-only tools preferred
    38→    Explore,
    39→    /// Default productive mode
    40→    Execute,
    41→    /// High side-effect pressure — validate before committing
    42→    Verify,
    43→    /// Error streak >= threshold
    44→    Recover,
    45→    /// Pending approvals or human input needed
    46→    AskHuman,
    47→    /// Progress >= 98% or awaiting next signal
    48→    Sleep,
    49→}
    50→
    51→/// Budget remaining for the current agent run.
    52→#[derive(ToSchema)]
    53→#[schema(as = BudgetState)]
    54→#[allow(dead_code)]
    55→struct BudgetStateSchema {
    56→    tokens_remaining: u64,
    57→    time_remaining_ms: u64,
    58→    cost_remaining_usd: f64,
    59→    tool_calls_remaining: u32,
    60→    error_budget_remaining: u32,
    61→}
    62→
    63→/// Risk level assessment.
    64→#[derive(ToSchema)]
    65→#[schema(as = RiskLevel)]
    66→#[allow(dead_code)]
    67→enum RiskLevelSchema {
    68→    Low,
    69→    Medium,
    70→    High,
    71→    Critical,
    72→}
    73→
    74→/// Homeostatic state vector of the agent.
    75→#[derive(ToSchema)]
    76→#[schema(as = AgentStateVector)]
    77→#[allow(dead_code)]
    78→struct AgentStateVectorSchema {
    79→    progress: f32,
    80→    uncertainty: f32,
    81→    #[schema(schema_with = RiskLevelSchema::schema)]
    82→    risk_level: RiskLevelSchema,
    83→    #[schema(schema_with = BudgetStateSchema::schema)]
    84→    budget: BudgetStateSchema,
    85→    error_streak: u32,
    86→    context_pressure: f32,
    87→    side_effect_pressure: f32,
    88→    human_dependency: f32,
    89→}
    90→
    91→/// Policy configuration for a session.
    92→#[derive(ToSchema)]
    93→#[schema(as = PolicySet)]
    94→#[allow(dead_code)]
    95→struct PolicySetSchema {
    96→    /// Capabilities allowed without approval (e.g. "fs:read:**")
    97→    allow_capabilities: Vec<String>,
    98→    /// Capabilities requiring approval before use
    99→    gate_capabilities: Vec<String>,
   100→    max_tool_runtime_secs: u64,
   101→    max_events_per_turn: u64,
   102→}
   103→
   104→/// Model routing configuration.
   105→#[derive(ToSchema)]
   106→#[schema(as = ModelRouting)]
   107→#[allow(dead_code)]
   108→struct ModelRoutingSchema {
   109→    /// Primary model identifier (e.g. "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929")
   110→    primary_model: String,
   111→    /// Fallback models tried in order if primary fails
   112→    fallback_models: Vec<String>,
   113→    temperature: f32,
   114→}
   115→
   116→/// Session manifest returned on creation.
   117→#[derive(ToSchema)]
   118→#[schema(as = SessionManifest)]
   119→#[allow(dead_code)]
   120→struct SessionManifestSchema {
   121→    session_id: String,
   122→    owner: String,
   123→    created_at: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>,
   124→    workspace_root: String,
   125→    #[schema(schema_with = ModelRoutingSchema::schema)]
   126→    model_routing: ModelRoutingSchema,
   127→    policy: serde_json::Value,
   128→}
   129→
   130→/// Information about a branch within a session.
   131→#[derive(ToSchema)]
   132→#[schema(as = BranchInfo)]
   133→#[allow(dead_code)]
   134→struct BranchInfoSchema {
   135→    branch_id: String,
   136→    parent_branch: Option<String>,
   137→    fork_sequence: u64,
   138→    head_sequence: u64,
   139→    merged_into: Option<String>,
   140→}
   141→
   142→/// Result of merging one branch into another.
   143→#[derive(ToSchema)]
   144→#[schema(as = BranchMergeResult)]
   145→#[allow(dead_code)]
   146→struct BranchMergeResultSchema {
   147→    source_branch: String,
   148→    target_branch: String,
   149→    source_head_sequence: u64,
   150→    target_head_sequence: u64,
   151→}
   152→
   153→/// A single event record from the event journal.
   154→#[derive(ToSchema)]
   155→#[schema(as = EventRecord)]
   156→#[allow(dead_code)]
   157→struct EventRecordSchema {
   158→    event_id: String,
   159→    session_id: String,
   160→    agent_id: String,
   161→    branch_id: String,
   162→    sequence: u64,
   163→    timestamp: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>,
   164→    actor: serde_json::Value,
   165→    schema: serde_json::Value,
   166→    causation_id: Option<String>,
   167→    correlation_id: Option<String>,
   168→    trace_id: Option<String>,
   169→    span_id: Option<String>,
   170→    digest: Option<String>,
   171→    /// Discriminated union — the event payload
   172→    kind: serde_json::Value,
   173→}
   174→
   175→// ─── Request / Response types ────────────────────────────────────────────────
   176→
   177→#[derive(Clone)]
   178→struct CanonicalState {
   179→    runtime: Arc<KernelRuntime>,
   180→    provider_handle: SwappableProviderHandle,
   181→    provider_factory: Arc<dyn ProviderFactory>,
   182→}
   183→
   184→#[derive(Debug, Deserialize, Default, ToSchema)]
   185→struct CreateSessionRequest {
   186→    /// Explicit session ID (auto-generated if omitted)
   187→    session_id: Option<String>,
   188→    /// Session owner (defaults to "arcan")
   189→    owner: Option<String>,
   190→    #[schema(schema_with = PolicySetSchema::schema)]
   191→    policy: Option<PolicySet>,
   192→    #[schema(schema_with = ModelRoutingSchema::schema)]
   193→    model_routing: Option<ModelRouting>,
   194→}
   195→
   196→#[derive(Debug, Deserialize, ToSchema)]
   197→struct RunRequest {
   198→    /// The objective / user message for this agent run
   199→    objective: String,
   200→    /// Target branch (defaults to "main")
   201→    branch: Option<String>,
   202→    /// Optional pre-proposed tool call
   203→    proposed_tool: Option<ProposedToolRequest>,
   204→}
   205→
   206→#[derive(Debug, Deserialize, ToSchema)]
   207→struct ProposedToolRequest {
   208→    tool_name: String,
   209→    input: serde_json::Value,
   210→    /// Capability strings required (e.g. "fs:read:**")
   211→    #[serde(default)]
   212→    requested_capabilities: Vec<String>,
   213→}
   214→
   215→#[derive(Debug, Deserialize, Default, IntoParams)]
   216→struct EventQuery {
   217→    /// Branch name (defaults to "main")
   218→    branch: Option<String>,
   219→    /// Start reading from this sequence number
   220→    from_sequence: Option<u64>,
   221→    /// Max events to return (default 256, max 10000)
   222→    limit: Option<usize>,
   223→}
   224→
   225→#[derive(Debug, Deserialize, Default, IntoParams)]
   226→struct StreamQuery {
   227→    /// Branch name (defaults to "main")
   228→    branch: Option<String>,
   229→    /// Resume from this sequence (0 = replay all)
   230→    cursor: Option<u64>,
   231→    /// Max events to replay before switching to live (default 512)
   232→    replay_limit: Option<usize>,
   233→    /// Stream format: "canonical" (default) or "vercel_ai_sdk_v6"
   234→    format: Option<String>,
   235→}
   236→
   237→#[derive(Debug, Deserialize, ToSchema)]
   238→struct CreateBranchRequest {
   239→    /// Name for the new branch
   240→    branch: String,
   241→    /// Parent branch to fork from (defaults to "main")
   242→    from_branch: Option<String>,
   243→    /// Sequence number to fork at (defaults to head)
   244→    fork_sequence: Option<u64>,
   245→}
   246→
   247→#[derive(Debug, Deserialize, Default, ToSchema)]
   248→struct MergeBranchRequest {
   249→    /// Target branch to merge into (defaults to "main")
   250→    target_branch: Option<String>,
   251→}
   252→
   253→#[derive(Debug, Deserialize, ToSchema)]
   254→struct ResolveApprovalRequest {
   255→    /// Whether the approval is granted
   256→    approved: bool,
   257→    /// Actor resolving the approval (defaults to "api")
   258→    actor: Option<String>,
   259→}
   260→
   261→#[derive(Debug, Deserialize, ToSchema)]
   262→struct SetProviderRequest {
   263→    /// Provider spec: `"provider_name"` or `"provider_name:model"`.
   264→    provider: String,
   265→}
   266→
   267→#[derive(Debug, Serialize, ToSchema)]
   268→struct ProviderResponse {
   269→    /// Currently active provider name.
   270→    provider: String,
   271→    /// Available provider names that can be switched to.
   272→    available: Vec<String>,
   273→}
   274→
   275→#[derive(Debug, Serialize, ToSchema)]
   276→struct RunResponse {
   277→    #[schema(value_type = String, example = "sess-abc123")]
   278→    session_id: SessionId,
   279→    #[schema(schema_with = OperatingModeSchema::schema)]
   280→    mode: OperatingMode,
   281→    #[schema(schema_with = AgentStateVectorSchema::schema)]
   282→    state: AgentStateVector,
   283→    events_emitted: u64,
   284→    last_sequence: u64,
   285→}
   286→
   287→#[derive(Debug, Serialize, ToSchema)]
   288→struct StateResponse {
   289→    #[schema(value_type = String, example = "sess-abc123")]
   290→    session_id: SessionId,
   291→    #[schema(value_type = String, example = "main")]
   292→    branch: BranchId,
   293→    #[schema(schema_with = OperatingModeSchema::schema)]
   294→    mode: OperatingMode,
   295→    #[schema(schema_with = AgentStateVectorSchema::schema)]
   296→    state: AgentStateVector,
   297→    version: u64,
   298→}
   299→
   300→#[derive(Debug, Serialize, ToSchema)]
   301→struct EventListResponse {
   302→    #[schema(value_type = String)]
   303→    session_id: SessionId,
   304→    #[schema(value_type = String)]
   305→    branch: BranchId,
   306→    from_sequence: u64,
   307→    #[schema(schema_with = Vec::<EventRecordSchema>::schema)]
   308→    events: Vec<EventRecord>,
   309→}
   310→
   311→#[derive(Debug, Serialize, ToSchema)]
   312→struct BranchListResponse {
   313→    #[schema(value_type = String)]
   314→    session_id: SessionId,
   315→    #[schema(schema_with = Vec::<BranchInfoSchema>::schema)]
   316→    branches: Vec<BranchInfo>,
   317→}
   318→
   319→#[derive(Debug, Serialize, ToSchema)]
   320→struct BranchMergeResponse {
   321→    #[schema(value_type = String)]
   322→    session_id: SessionId,
   323→    #[schema(schema_with = BranchMergeResultSchema::schema)]
   324→    result: BranchMergeResult,
   325→}
   326→
   327→#[derive(Debug, Serialize, ToSchema)]
   328→struct SessionSummary {
   329→    session_id: String,
   330→    owner: String,
   331→    created_at: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>,
   332→}
   333→
   334→#[derive(Debug, Serialize, ToSchema)]
   335→struct ErrorResponse {
   336→    error: String,
   337→}
   338→
   339→// ─── OpenAPI document ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   340→
   341→#[derive(OpenApi)]
   342→#[openapi(
   343→    info(
   344→        title = "Arcan Agent Runtime API",
   345→        version = "0.2.1",
   346→        description = "HTTP API for the Arcan agent runtime daemon — session management, agent runs, event streaming, branching, and approval workflows.",
   347→        license(name = "MIT"),
   348→    ),
   349→    paths(
   350→        health,
   351→        list_sessions,
   352→        create_session,
   353→        run_session,
   354→        get_state,
   355→        list_events,
   356→        stream_events,
   357→        create_branch,
   358→        list_branches,
   359→        merge_branch,
   360→        resolve_approval,
   361→        get_provider,
   362→        set_provider,
   363→    ),
   364→    components(schemas(
   365→        // Request / response types
   366→        CreateSessionRequest,
   367→        RunRequest,
   368→        ProposedToolRequest,
   369→        RunResponse,
   370→        StateResponse,
   371→        EventListResponse,
   372→        BranchListResponse,
   373→        BranchMergeResponse,
   374→        SessionSummary,
   375→        CreateBranchRequest,
   376→        MergeBranchRequest,
   377→        ResolveApprovalRequest,
   378→        SetProviderRequest,
   379→        ProviderResponse,
   380→        ErrorResponse,
   381→        // Mirror schemas for external aios-protocol types
   382→        OperatingModeSchema,
   383→        AgentStateVectorSchema,
   384→        BudgetStateSchema,
   385→        RiskLevelSchema,
   386→        PolicySetSchema,
   387→        ModelRoutingSchema,
   388→        SessionManifestSchema,
   389→        BranchInfoSchema,
   390→        BranchMergeResultSchema,
   391→        EventRecordSchema,
   392→    )),
   393→    tags(
   394→        (name = "health", description = "Health check"),
   395→        (name = "sessions", description = "Session lifecycle"),
   396→        (name = "runs", description = "Agent run execution"),
   397→        (name = "events", description = "Event log and streaming"),
   398→        (name = "branches", description = "Branch management"),
   399→        (name = "approvals", description = "Approval workflow"),
   400→        (name = "provider", description = "Live provider switching"),
   401→    )
   402→)]
   403→struct ApiDoc;
   404→
   405→/// Return the OpenAPI specification.
   406→pub fn openapi_spec() -> utoipa::openapi::OpenApi {
   407→    ApiDoc::openapi()
   408→}
   409→
   410→async fn openapi_json() -> Json<utoipa::openapi::OpenApi> {
   411→    Json(ApiDoc::openapi())
   412→}

   414→// ─── Router ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   415→
   416→pub fn create_canonical_router(
   417→    runtime: Arc<KernelRuntime>,
   418→    provider_handle: SwappableProviderHandle,
   419→    provider_factory: Arc<dyn ProviderFactory>,
   420→) -> Router {
   421→    let state = CanonicalState {
   422→        runtime,
   423→        provider_handle,
   424→        provider_factory,
   425→    };
   426→    Router::new()
   427→        .route("/health", get(health))
   428→        .route("/openapi.json", get(openapi_json))
   429→        .merge(Scalar::with_url("/docs", ApiDoc::openapi()))
   430→        .route("/sessions", get(list_sessions).post(create_session))
   431→        .route("/sessions/{session_id}/runs", post(run_session))
   432→        .route("/sessions/{session_id}/state", get(get_state))
   433→        .route("/sessions/{session_id}/events", get(list_events))
   434→        .route("/sessions/{session_id}/events/stream", get(stream_events))
   435→        .route(
   436→            "/sessions/{session_id}/branches",
   437→            post(create_branch).get(list_branches),
   438→        )
   439→        .route(
   440→            "/sessions/{session_id}/branches/{branch_id}/merge",
   441→            post(merge_branch),
   442→        )
   443→        .route(
   444→            "/sessions/{session_id}/approvals/{approval_id}",
   445→            post(resolve_approval),
   446→        )
   447→        .route("/provider", get(get_provider).put(set_provider))
   448→        .with_state(state)
   449→}
   450→
   451→// ─── Stream format ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   452→
   453→#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
   454→enum StreamFormat {
   455→    Canonical,
   456→    VercelAiSdkV6,
   457→}
   458→
   459→impl StreamFormat {
   460→    fn from_query(value: Option<&str>) -> Self {
   461→        match value {
   462→            Some("vercel_ai_sdk_v6" | "aisdk_v6") => Self::VercelAiSdkV6,
   463→            _ => Self::Canonical,
   464→        }
   465→    }
   466→}

   493→async fn list_sessions(State(state): State<CanonicalState>) -> Json<Vec<SessionSummary>> {
   494→    let manifests = state.runtime.list_sessions();
   495→    let mut summaries: Vec<SessionSummary> = manifests
   496→        .into_iter()
   497→        .map(|m| SessionSummary {
   498→            session_id: m.session_id.as_str().to_owned(),
   499→            owner: m.owner,
   500→            created_at: m.created_at,
   501→        })
   502→        .collect();
   503→    summaries.sort_by(|a, b| b.created_at.cmp(&a.created_at));
   504→    Json(summaries)
   505→}

   507→async fn persist_last_session_hint(runtime: &KernelRuntime, session_id: &SessionId) {
   508→    let path = runtime.root_path().join("last_session");
   509→    let _ = fs::write(path, session_id.as_str()).await;
   510→}

   522→async fn create_session(
   523→    State(state): State<CanonicalState>,
   524→    Json(request): Json<CreateSessionRequest>,
   525→) -> Result<Json<aios_protocol::SessionManifest>, (StatusCode, Json<serde_json::Value>)> {
   526→    let owner = request.owner.unwrap_or_else(|| "arcan".to_owned());
   527→    let policy = request.policy.unwrap_or_default();
   528→    let routing = request.model_routing.unwrap_or_default();
   529→    let manifest = if let Some(session_id) = request.session_id {
   530→        state
   531→            .runtime
   532→            .create_session_with_id(SessionId::from_string(session_id), owner, policy, routing)
   533→            .await
   534→            .map_err(internal_error)?
   535→    } else {
   536→        state
   537→            .runtime
   538→            .create_session(owner, policy, routing)
   539→            .await
   540→            .map_err(internal_error)?
   541→    };
   542→    persist_last_session_hint(state.runtime.as_ref(), &manifest.session_id).await;
   543→    Ok(Json(manifest))
   544→}

   547→    post,
   548→    path = "/sessions/{session_id}/runs",

   551→    request_body = RunRequest,
   552→    responses(
   553→        (status = 200, description = "Run completed", body = RunResponse),

   557→async fn run_session(
   558→    Path(session_id): Path<String>,
   559→    State(state): State<CanonicalState>,
   560→    Json(request): Json<RunRequest>,
   561→) -> Result<Json<RunResponse>, (StatusCode, Json<serde_json::Value>)> {
   562→    let session_id = SessionId::from_string(session_id);
   563→    let branch = request
   564→        .branch
   565→        .as_deref()
   566→        .map(BranchId::from_string)
   567→        .unwrap_or_else(BranchId::main);
   568→    if !state.runtime.session_exists(&session_id) {
   569→        state
   570→            .runtime
   571→            .create_session_with_id(
   572→                session_id.clone(),
   573→                "arcan",
   574→                PolicySet::default(),
   575→                ModelRouting::default(),
   576→            )
   577→            .await
   578→            .map_err(internal_error)?;
   579→    }
   580→
   581→    let capabilities: Vec<aios_protocol::Capability> = request
   582→        .proposed_tool
   583→        .as_ref()
   584→        .map(|t| {
   585→            t.requested_capabilities
   586→                .iter()
   587→                .map(|s| aios_protocol::Capability::new(s.clone()))
   588→                .collect()
   589→        })
   590→        .unwrap_or_default();
   591→
   592→    let proposed_tool = request
   593→        .proposed_tool
   594→        .map(|tool| ToolCall::new(tool.tool_name, tool.input, capabilities.clone()));
   595→
   596→    let agent_span = vigil::spans::agent_span(session_id.as_str(), "arcan");
   597→    let tick = state
   598→        .runtime
   599→        .tick_on_branch(
   600→            &session_id,
   601→            &branch,
   602→            TickInput {
   603→                objective: request.objective,
   604→                proposed_tool,
   605→            },
   606→        )
   607→        .instrument(agent_span)
   608→        .await
   609→        .map_err(internal_error)?;
   610→
   611→    persist_last_session_hint(state.runtime.as_ref(), &tick.session_id).await;
   612→
   613→    Ok(Json(RunResponse {
   614→        session_id: tick.session_id,
   615→        mode: tick.mode,
   616→        state: tick.state,
   617→        events_emitted: tick.events_emitted,
   618→        last_sequence: tick.last_sequence,
   619→    }))
   620→}
   621→
   622→#[utoipa::path(
   623→    get,
   624→    path = "/sessions/{session_id}/state",
   625→    tag = "sessions",
   626→    params(
   627→        ("session_id" = String, Path, description = "Session identifier"),
   628→        EventQuery,
   629→    ),
   630→    responses(
   631→        (status = 200, description = "Current session state", body = StateResponse),
   632→        (status = 500, description = "Internal error", body = ErrorResponse)
   633→    )
   634→)]
   635→async fn get_state(
   636→    Path(session_id): Path<String>,
   637→    Query(query): Query<EventQuery>,
   638→    State(state): State<CanonicalState>,
   639→) -> Result<Json<StateResponse>, (StatusCode, Json<serde_json::Value>)> {
   640→    let session_id = SessionId::from_string(session_id);
   641→    let branch = query
   642→        .branch
   643→        .as_deref()
   644→        .map(BranchId::from_string)
   645→        .unwrap_or_else(BranchId::main);
   646→    let events = state
   647→        .runtime
   648→        .read_events_on_branch(&session_id, &branch, 1, 4096)
   649→        .await
   650→        .map_err(internal_error)?;
   651→
   652→    let mut latest_state = AgentStateVector::default();
   653→    let mut mode = OperatingMode::Explore;
   654→    let mut version = 0_u64;
   655→    for event in events {
   656→        version = event.sequence;
   657→        if let EventKind::StateEstimated {
   658→            state,
   659→            mode: event_mode,
   660→        } = event.kind
   661→        {
   662→            latest_state = state;
   663→            mode = event_mode;
   664→        }
   665→    }
   666→
   667→    Ok(Json(StateResponse {
   668→        session_id,
   669→        branch,
   670→        mode,
   671→        state: latest_state,
   672→        version,
   673→    }))
   674→}

   676→#[utoipa::path(
   677→    get,
   678→    path = "/sessions/{session_id}/events",
   679→    tag = "events",
   680→    params(
   681→        ("session_id" = String, Path, description = "Session identifier"),
   682→        EventQuery,
   683→    ),
   684→    responses(
   685→        (status = 200, description = "List of events", body = EventListResponse),
   686→        (status = 500, description = "Internal error", body = ErrorResponse)
   687→    )
   688→)]
   689→async fn list_events(
   690→    Path(session_id): Path<String>,
   691→    Query(query): Query<EventQuery>,
   692→    State(state): State<CanonicalState>,
   693→) -> Result<Json<EventListResponse>, (StatusCode, Json<serde_json::Value>)> {
   694→    let session_id = SessionId::from_string(session_id);
   695→    let branch = query
   696→        .branch
   697→        .as_deref()
   698→        .map(BranchId::from_string)
   699→        .unwrap_or_else(BranchId::main);
   700→    let from_sequence = query.from_sequence.unwrap_or(1);
   701→    let limit = query.limit.unwrap_or(256).min(10_000);
   702→
   703→    let events = state
   704→        .runtime
   705→        .read_events_on_branch(&session_id, &branch, from_sequence, limit)
   706→        .await
   707→        .map_err(internal_error)?;
   708→
   709→    Ok(Json(EventListResponse {
   710→        session_id,
   711→        branch,
   712→        from_sequence,
   713→        events,
   714→    }))
   715→}
   716→
   717→#[utoipa::path(
   718→    get,
   719→    path = "/sessions/{session_id}/events/stream",
   720→    tag = "events",
   721→    params(
   722→        ("session_id" = String, Path, description = "Session identifier"),
   723→        StreamQuery,
   724→    ),
   725→    responses(
   726→        (status = 200, description = "SSE event stream", content_type = "text/event-stream"),
   727→        (status = 500, description = "Internal error", body = ErrorResponse)
   728→    )
   729→)]
   730→async fn stream_events(
   731→    Path(session_id): Path<String>,
   732→    Query(query): Query<StreamQuery>,
   733→    State(state): State<CanonicalState>,
   734→) -> Result<Response, (StatusCode, Json<serde_json::Value>)> {
   735→    let session_id = SessionId::from_string(session_id);
   736→    let format = StreamFormat::from_query(query.format.as_deref());
   737→    let branch = query
   738→        .branch
   739→        .as_deref()
   740→        .map(BranchId::from_string)
   741→        .unwrap_or_else(BranchId::main);
   742→    let cursor = query.cursor.unwrap_or(0);
   743→    let replay_limit = query.replay_limit.unwrap_or(512).min(10_000);
   744→
   745→    let replay = state
   746→        .runtime
   747→        .read_events_on_branch(&session_id, &branch, cursor.saturating_add(1), replay_limit)
   748→        .await
   749→        .map_err(internal_error)?;
   750→
   751→    let mut subscription = state.runtime.subscribe_events();
   752→    let (tx, rx) = mpsc::channel::<EventRecord>(256);
   753→    let session_filter = session_id.clone();
   754→    let branch_filter = branch.clone();
   755→
   756→    tokio::spawn(async move {
   757→        for event in replay {
   758→            let _ = tx.send(event).await;
   759→        }
   760→        while let Ok(event) = subscription.recv().await {
   761→            if event.session_id == session_filter
   762→                && event.branch_id == branch_filter
   763→                && (event.sequence > cursor || event.sequence == 0)
   764→            {
   765→                let _ = tx.send(event).await;
   766→            }
   767→        }
   768→    });
   769→
   770→    let stream = ReceiverStream::new(rx).map(move |event| {
   771→        let base = Event::default().id(event.sequence.to_string());
   772→        let frame = match format {
   773→            StreamFormat::Canonical => {
   774→                let payload = serde_json::to_string(&event).unwrap_or_else(|_| "{}".to_owned());
   775→                base.data(payload)
   776→            }
   777→            StreamFormat::VercelAiSdkV6 => {
   778→                let payload =
   779→                    serde_json::to_string(&json!({ "type": "data-aios-event", "data": event }))
   780→                        .unwrap_or_else(|_| "{}".to_owned());
   781→                base.data(payload)
   782→            }
   783→        };
   784→        Ok::<Event, Infallible>(frame)
   785→    });
   786→
   787→    let sse = Sse::new(stream).keep_alive(KeepAlive::new().interval(Duration::from_secs(15)));
   788→    let mut response = sse.into_response();
   789→    if format == StreamFormat::VercelAiSdkV6 {
   790→        response.headers_mut().insert(
   791→            "x-vercel-ai-ui-message-stream",
   792→            "v1".parse().expect("static header value"),
   793→        );
   794→    }
   795→    Ok(response)
   796→}

   865→async fn merge_branch(
   866→    Path((session_id, branch_id)): Path<(String, String)>,
   867→    State(state): State<CanonicalState>,
   868→    Json(request): Json<MergeBranchRequest>,

   870→    let session_id = SessionId::from_string(session_id);

   889→        ("session_id" = String, Path, description = "Session identifier"),

   891→    ),

   893→    responses(
   894→        (status = 204, description = "Approval resolved"),

   899→async fn resolve_approval(
   900→    Path((session_id, approval_id)): Path<(String, String)>,
   901→    State(state): State<CanonicalState>,
   902→    Json(request): Json<ResolveApprovalRequest>,
   903→) -> Result<impl IntoResponse, (StatusCode, Json<serde_json::Value>)> {
   904→    let session_id = SessionId::from_string(session_id);
   905→    let parsed = Uuid::parse_str(&approval_id).map_err(bad_request)?;
   906→    let actor = request.actor.unwrap_or_else(|| "api".to_owned());
   907→
   908→    state
   909→        .runtime
   910→        .resolve_approval(&session_id, parsed, request.approved, actor)
   911→        .await
   912→        .map_err(internal_error)?;
   913→
   914→    Ok((StatusCode::NO_CONTENT, Json(json!({}))))
   915→}

   917→// ─── Provider switching ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
   918→
   919→#[utoipa::path(
   920→    get,
   921→    path = "/provider",
   922→    tag = "provider",
   923→    responses(
   924→        (status = 200, description = "Current provider info", body = ProviderResponse)
   925→    )
   926→)]
   927→async fn get_provider(
   928→    State(state): State<CanonicalState>,
   929→) -> Result<Json<ProviderResponse>, (StatusCode, Json<serde_json::Value>)> {
   930→    let provider_name = state
   931→        .provider_handle
   932→        .read()
   933→        .unwrap_or_else(std::sync::PoisonError::into_inner)
   934→        .name()
   935→        .to_owned();
   936→    let factory = state.provider_factory.clone();
   937→    let available = tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || factory.available_providers())
   938→        .await
   939→        .map_err(|e| internal_error(format!("available_providers task panicked: {e}")))?;
   940→    Ok(Json(ProviderResponse {
   941→        provider: provider_name,
   942→        available,
   943→    }))
   944→}
   945→
   946→#[utoipa::path(
   947→    put,
   948→    path = "/provider",
   949→    tag = "provider",
   950→    request_body = SetProviderRequest,
   951→    responses(
   952→        (status = 200, description = "Provider switched", body = ProviderResponse),
   953→        (status = 400, description = "Invalid provider spec", body = ErrorResponse)
   954→    )
   955→)]
   956→async fn set_provider(
   957→    State(state): State<CanonicalState>,
   958→    Json(request): Json<SetProviderRequest>,
   959→) -> Result<Json<ProviderResponse>, (StatusCode, Json<serde_json::Value>)> {
   960→    // Provider constructors create `reqwest::blocking::Client`, which spawns an
   961→    // internal Tokio runtime and panics if called from an async worker thread.
   962→    // Move the build into a blocking thread to avoid the conflict.
   963→    let factory = state.provider_factory.clone();
   964→    let spec = request.provider.clone();
   965→    let new_provider = tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || factory.build(&spec))
   966→        .await
   967→        .map_err(|e| internal_error(format!("provider build task panicked: {e}")))?
   968→        .map_err(bad_request)?;
   969→
   970→    let new_name = new_provider.name().to_owned();
   971→    {
   972→        let mut guard = state
   973→            .provider_handle
   974→            .write()
   975→            .unwrap_or_else(std::sync::PoisonError::into_inner);
   976→        *guard = new_provider;
   977→    }
   978→
   979→    let factory = state.provider_factory.clone();
   980→    let available = tokio::task::spawn_blocking(move || factory.available_providers())
   981→        .await
   982→        .map_err(|e| internal_error(format!("available_providers task panicked: {e}")))?;
   983→
   984→    tracing::info!(provider = %new_name, spec = %request.provider, "Provider switched via API");
   985→
   986→    Ok(Json(ProviderResponse {
   987→        provider: new_name,
   988→        available,
   989→    }))
   990→}
   991→
   992→// ─── Error helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   993→
   994→fn internal_error(error: impl std::fmt::Display) -> (StatusCode, Json<serde_json::Value>) {
   995→    (
   996→        StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
   997→        Json(json!({ "error": error.to_string() })),
   998→    )
   999→}
  1000→
  1001→fn bad_request(error: impl std::fmt::Display) -> (StatusCode, Json<serde_json::Value>) {
  1002→    (
  1003→        StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST,
  1004→        Json(json!({ "error": error.to_string() })),
  1005→    )
  1006→}
  1007→
  1008→#[cfg(test)]
  1009→mod tests {
  1010→    use super::*;
  1011→
  1012→    #[test]
  1013→    fn openapi_spec_is_valid() {
  1014→        let spec = openapi_spec();
  1015→        let json = serde_json::to_value(&spec).expect("spec should serialize to JSON");
  1016→
  1017→        assert_eq!(json["info"]["title"], "Arcan Agent Runtime API");
  1018→        assert_eq!(json["info"]["version"], "0.2.1");
  1019→
  1020→        let paths = json["paths"]
  1021→            .as_object()
  1022→            .expect("paths should be an object");
  1023→        assert!(paths.contains_key("/health"), "missing /health path");
  1024→        assert!(paths.contains_key("/sessions"), "missing /sessions path");
  1025→        assert!(
  1026→            paths.contains_key("/sessions/{session_id}/runs"),
  1027→            "missing runs path"
  1028→        );
  1029→        assert!(
  1030→            paths.contains_key("/sessions/{session_id}/state"),
  1031→            "missing state path"
  1032→        );
  1033→        assert!(
  1034→            paths.contains_key("/sessions/{session_id}/events"),
  1035→            "missing events path"
  1036→        );
  1037→        assert!(
  1038→            paths.contains_key("/sessions/{session_id}/events/stream"),
  1039→            "missing stream path"
  1040→        );
  1041→        assert!(
  1042→            paths.contains_key("/sessions/{session_id}/branches"),
  1043→            "missing branches path"
  1044→        );
  1045→        assert!(
  1046→            paths.contains_key("/sessions/{session_id}/branches/{branch_id}/merge"),
  1047→            "missing merge path"
  1048→        );
  1049→        assert!(
  1050→            paths.contains_key("/sessions/{session_id}/approvals/{approval_id}"),
  1051→            "missing approval path"
  1052→        );
  1053→        assert!(paths.contains_key("/provider"), "missing provider path");
  1054→
  1055→        // Verify typed schemas exist (not just Object)
  1056→        let schemas = json["components"]["schemas"]
  1057→            .as_object()
  1058→            .expect("schemas should be an object");
  1059→        assert!(schemas.contains_key("RunResponse"));
  1060→        assert!(schemas.contains_key("CreateSessionRequest"));
  1061→        assert!(schemas.contains_key("AgentStateVector"));
  1062→        assert!(schemas.contains_key("OperatingMode"));
  1063→        assert!(schemas.contains_key("BudgetState"));
  1064→        assert!(schemas.contains_key("RiskLevel"));
  1065→        assert!(schemas.contains_key("PolicySet"));
  1066→        assert!(schemas.contains_key("ModelRouting"));
  1067→        assert!(schemas.contains_key("SessionManifest"));
  1068→        assert!(schemas.contains_key("BranchInfo"));
  1069→        assert!(schemas.contains_key("BranchMergeResult"));
  1070→        assert!(schemas.contains_key("EventRecord"));
  1071→    }
  1072→}
  1073→
